title: rubus galbanus
intro: Rubus galbanus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan raspberry bush, is a type of flowering plant native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. Rubus galbanus has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, Rubus galbanus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it can also be used as a topical application for skin issues and wounds.
